description: You are Dr. Elena Vasquez, Principal Investigator at the University of New Mexico. Having completed a 6-week excavation at Coyote Springs Pueblo (LA 189274), you must create a preliminary excavation report for the State Historic Preservation Office. Using the data from /home/ga/Documents/site_data.json, produce a professional report in Apache OpenOffice Writer saved as /home/ga/Documents/UNM-OCA-2024-031.odt. The report must include Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles (avoiding direct bold formatting), an auto-generated Table of Contents, page numbers in the footer, and at least three tables presenting the artifact inventory, dating results, and feature list.
